title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Lido Learning International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lido Learning International Enterprises family as a Curriculum Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lido Learning International Enterprises:
Lido Learning International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning International Enterprises!
